plugin.name: FHX
plugin.author: Eric
plugin.purpose: Repeatedly cast 'incomp' on self or others until healed
plugin.description:
FHX - repeatedly casts incomplete healing until the target is healed, you run low on mana, or you enter combat.
fhx self-heal (cast 'c incomp' on yourself) fhx <player> heal another player ('c incomp <player>') fhx low heal the lowest-HP group member in the room fhx stop stop healing immediately fhx help show the help screen
Stops automatically on: - "You are almost fully healed." (self) - "<player> is almost fully healed." (other) - "<player> is already fully healed." (other) - "Your magic is wasted." (target already full) - "You don't have enough mana to cast 'incomplete healing'." - "You can't concentrate enough to cast 'incomplete healing'." - you enter combat (GMCP char.status.state)
'fhx low' uses GMCP group data, so you must be grouped with the target. It locks onto one target and will not jump to whoever later becomes the lowest - run it again to retarget.

trigger.name: fhx_heal_tick
trigger.match: You are .* healed by your magic touch\.

trigger.name: fhx_other_heal_tick
trigger.match: (\w+) is .* healed by your magic touch\.

trigger.name: fhx_no_mana
trigger.match: You don't have enough mana to cast 'incomplete healing'\.

trigger.name: fhx_cant_concentrate
trigger.match: You can't concentrate enough to cast 'incomplete healing'\.

muclient.script:
-- FHX plugin -- Author: Eric -- -- "fhx" self-heals (c incomp) - paced by heal-tick lines -- "fhx <player>" heals another player - paced by heal-tick lines -- "fhx low" heals lowest-HP group member in the room -- "fhx stop" stops immediately -- "fhx help" shows the help screen
require "gmcphelper"
local GMCP_ID = "3e7dedbe37e44942dd46d264"
-- ---- tunables ---------------------------------------------------------- -- Both self-heal and healing-others use the SAME pacing: cast, wait for the -- heal-tick line, then resend after FHX_CAST_DELAY. The watchdog stops things -- if no heal-tick is seen within FHX_WATCHDOG seconds. local FHX_CAST_DELAY = 1 -- pause after each heal-tick before resending local FHX_WATCHDOG = 10 -- stop if no heal-tick seen within this long local SENDTO_SCRIPT = 12 -- "execute as script" send-to code
-- Diagnostics: flip to true to print [FHX dbg] lines while troubleshooting. local FHX_DEBUG = false local function dbg (s) if FHX_DEBUG then ColourNote ("yellow", "", "[FHX dbg] " .. s) end end
-- ---- colour helper (renders @x### and @-letter codes as a Note) -------- local function xterm_to_hex (n) n = tonumber (n) if not n then return "#aaaaaa" end if n < 16 then local base = {[0]="#000000","#800000","#008000","#808000","#000080", "#800080","#008080","#c0c0c0","#808080","#ff0000","#00ff00", "#ffff00","#0000ff","#ff00ff","#00ffff","#ffffff"} return base[n] or "#aaaaaa" elseif n >= 232 then local g = (n - 232) * 10 + 8 return string.format ("#%02x%02x%02x", g, g, g) else n = n - 16 local r = math.floor (n / 36); n = n % 36 local g = math.floor (n / 6); local b = n % 6 local lvl = {[0]=0, 95, 135, 175, 215, 255} return string.format ("#%02x%02x%02x", lvl[r], lvl[g], lvl[b]) end end
local letter = { k="#000000", r="#aa0000", g="#00aa00", y="#aa5500", b="#0000aa", m="#aa00aa", c="#00aaaa", w="#aaaaaa", K="#555555", R="#ff5555", G="#55ff55", Y="#ffff55", B="#5555ff", M="#ff55ff", C="#55ffff", W="#ffffff", }
-- Parse a string with @x### / @<letter> colour codes and print it as one line. function cnote (s) local colour = "#aaaaaa" local buf, i, n = "", 1, #s local function flush () if buf ~= "" then ColourTell (colour, "", buf); buf = "" end end while i <= n do local ch = s:sub (i, i) if ch == "@" then local nxt = s:sub (i + 1, i + 1) if nxt == "x" then local digits = s:sub (i + 2):match ("^%d%d?%d?") or "" flush (); colour = xterm_to_hex (digits); i = i + 2 + #digits elseif nxt == "@" then buf = buf .. "@"; i = i + 2 elseif nxt ~= "" then flush (); colour = letter[nxt] or "#aaaaaa"; i = i + 2 else buf = buf .. "@"; i = i + 1 end else buf = buf .. ch; i = i + 1 end end flush () Note ("") -- terminate the line end
local tag = "@x099[@WFHX@x099]:@w "
-- ---- state ------------------------------------------------------------- healing_active = false heal_mode = "self" -- "self" or "other" heal_target = "" heal_gen = 0 -- bumped on every start/stop to cancel stale resend timers heal_watch_id = 0 -- bumped on every watchdog re-arm so stale watchdogs are ignored heal_cast_count = 0
-- ====================================================================== -- WATCHDOG (shared by both modes): stop if no heal-tick seen in time -- ====================================================================== function ArmWatchdog () heal_watch_id = heal_watch_id + 1 DoAfterSpecial (FHX_WATCHDOG, "Watchdog(" .. heal_watch_id .. ")", SENDTO_SCRIPT) end
function Watchdog (id) id = tonumber (id) -- only the most-recently-armed watchdog is valid; earlier stacked ones are stale if healing_active and id == heal_watch_id then StopHealing ("watchdog - no heal in " .. FHX_WATCHDOG .. "s") end end
-- ====================================================================== -- SELF HEAL (paced by "You are X healed by your magic touch.") -- ====================================================================== function StartSelfHeal () heal_gen = heal_gen + 1 healing_active = true heal_mode = "self" heal_target = "" heal_cast_count = 1 cnote (tag .. "@x045self-heal started@w - sending '@Wc incomp@w'.") dbg ("self cast #1 -> 'c incomp'") ArmWatchdog () Send ("c incomp") end
-- Fired by the "You are X healed by your magic touch." trigger function HealTick () if healing_active and heal_mode == "self" then ArmWatchdog () DoAfterSpecial (FHX_CAST_DELAY, "SelfCast(" .. heal_gen .. ")", SENDTO_SCRIPT) end end
function SelfCast (gen) gen = tonumber (gen) if healing_active and heal_mode == "self" and gen == heal_gen then heal_cast_count = heal_cast_count + 1 dbg ("self cast #" .. heal_cast_count .. " -> 'c incomp'") Send ("c incomp") end end
-- ====================================================================== -- HEAL ANOTHER PLAYER -- Paced exactly like self-heal, but off "<who> is X healed by your magic -- touch." for the current target. -- ====================================================================== function StartHealPlayer (who) who = tostring (who or ""):gsub ("^%s+", ""):gsub ("%s+$", "") if who == "" then return end BeginOtherHeal (who) end
function BeginOtherHeal (name) heal_gen = heal_gen + 1 healing_active = true heal_mode = "other" heal_target = name heal_cast_count = 1 dbg ("BeginOtherHeal: target='" .. name .. "' gen=" .. heal_gen) cnote (tag .. "@x045healing @W" .. name .. "@x045 - casting '@Wc incomp " .. name .. "@x045' until healed.") dbg ("cast #1 -> 'c incomp " .. name .. "'") ArmWatchdog () Send ("c incomp " .. name) end
-- Fired by the "<who> is X healed by your magic touch." trigger function OtherHealTick (who) -- "<name> is ... healed by your magic touch." only ever appears from OUR cast, -- and we heal one target at a time, so any such line means our heal landed. -- We deliberately do NOT name-match: the game line is prefixed with the -- target's title ("Sqrrlchasr Sletch is ..."), and the user may target by a -- partial name ("zarg" -> "Zargulis"). if healing_active and heal_mode == "other" then dbg ("heal-tick (" .. tostring (who) .. ") -> next cast in " .. FHX_CAST_DELAY .. "s") ArmWatchdog () DoAfterSpecial (FHX_CAST_DELAY, "OtherResend(" .. heal_gen .. ")", SENDTO_SCRIPT) end end
function OtherResend (gen) gen = tonumber (gen) if healing_active and heal_mode == "other" and gen == heal_gen then heal_cast_count = heal_cast_count + 1 dbg ("cast #" .. heal_cast_count .. " -> 'c incomp " .. heal_target .. "'") Send ("c incomp " .. heal_target) end end
-- Fired by the "<who> is almost/already fully healed." triggers function OtherHealedStop (who, reason) -- Same reasoning as OtherHealTick: one active target, so any "is almost/already -- fully healed." line during a heal is our target. Don't name-match. if healing_active and heal_mode == "other" then StopHealing (tostring (who) .. " " .. reason) end end
-- ====================================================================== -- HEAL LOWEST-HP GROUP MEMBER IN THE ROOM -- ====================================================================== function FindLowestGroupMember () local g = gmcp ("group") if type (g) ~= "table" or type (g.members) ~= "table" then dbg ("FindLowestGroupMember: no group data (type=" .. type (g) .. "). Is group GMCP on / are you grouped?") return nil end
local myname = "" local base = gmcp ("char.base") if type (base) == "table" and base.name then myname = string.lower (tostring (base.name)) end
local best, best_ratio = nil, 2 for _, m in ipairs (g.members) do local info = m.info if type (info) == "table" then local here = tostring (info.here) == "1" local hp = tonumber (info.hp) local mhp = tonumber (info.mhp) local isme = string.lower (tostring (m.name or "")) == myname if here and not isme and hp and mhp and mhp > 0 then local ratio = hp / mhp dbg (" candidate " .. tostring (m.name) .. ": hp=" .. hp .. "/" .. mhp .. " (" .. string.format ("%.0f%%", ratio * 100) .. ")") if ratio < 1 and ratio < best_ratio then best_ratio = ratio best = m.name end end end end return best end
function StartHealLow () local target = FindLowestGroupMember () dbg ("fhx low picked: " .. (target or "nobody")) if not target then cnote (tag .. "@x045no hurt group member found in the room@w. (Are you grouped, and is group GMCP on?)") return end BeginOtherHeal (target) end
-- ====================================================================== -- STOP -- ====================================================================== function StopHealing (reason) if healing_active then dbg ("StopHealing: reason='" .. reason .. "' after " .. heal_cast_count .. " cast(s)") healing_active = false heal_gen = heal_gen + 1 -- invalidate any pending timers local what = (heal_mode == "other" and heal_target ~= "") and ("healing " .. heal_target) or "self-heal" cnote (tag .. "@x045stopped@w @x099(" .. what .. ")@w - @W" .. reason .. ".") end end
-- ====================================================================== -- COMBAT DETECTION (stop healing when we enter a fight) -- ====================================================================== function OnPluginBroadcast (msg, id, name, text) if id == GMCP_ID and text == "char.status" and healing_active then local st = gmcp ("char.status") local state = (type (st) == "table") and tostring (st.state) or "?" if state == "8" then dbg ("char.status state=8 -> stopping for combat") StopHealing ("entered combat") end end end
-- ====================================================================== -- HELP -- ====================================================================== function ShowHelp () Note ("") cnote ("@x099===== @WFHX Help@x099 =====@w") cnote ("@x099Repeatedly casts incomplete healing until the target is healed,") cnote ("@x099you run low on mana, or you enter combat.@w") Note ("") cnote ("@x099Commands:@w") cnote (" @Wfhx@x045 @x099 self-heal (cast '@Wc incomp@x099' on yourself)") cnote (" @Wfhx <player>@x045 @x099 heal another player ('@Wc incomp <player>@x099')") cnote (" @Wfhx low@x045 @x099 heal the lowest-HP group member in the room") cnote (" @Wfhx stop@x045 @x099 stop healing right now") cnote (" @Wfhx help@x045 @x099 this screen") Note ("") cnote ("@x099Healing stops automatically when:@w") cnote (" @x045-@x099 the target is almost / already / fully healed") cnote (" @x045-@x099 you don't have enough mana, or can't concentrate") cnote (" @x045-@x099 you enter combat") Note ("") cnote ("@x099Notes:@w") cnote (" @x045-@x099 '@Wfhx low@x099' locks onto one target and will @Wnot@x099 jump to") cnote (" whoever later becomes the lowest - run it again to retarget.") cnote (" @x045-@x099 '@Wfhx low@x099' reads group HP via GMCP, so you must be grouped") cnote (" with the target.") Note ("") end
-- ====================================================================== -- LOAD -- ====================================================================== function FHXLoaded () -- ask Aardwolf to start streaming group data over GMCP (needed for 'fhx low') pcall (function () Send_GMCP_Packet ("group on") end) cnote (tag .. "@x045loaded@w @x099(v2.0)@w - type '@Wfhx help@w' for commands.") end
DoAfterSpecial (2, "FHXLoaded()", SENDTO_SCRIPT)
